title: Citi Appointed as Depositary Bank for Youlife Group Inc.’s ADR Program NEW YORK, July 24, 2025--Citi Issuer Services, acting through Citibank, N.A., has been appointed by Youlife Group Inc. (Youlife) as depositary bank for its American Depositary Receipt (ADR) program.

CITI RECOGNISED AS BEST INTERNATIONAL BANK IN SINGAPORE IN RECORD HAUL AT THE EUROMONEY AWARDS FOR EXCELLENCE 2025 Citi has been named the Best International Bank and Best Investment Bank for M&A in Singapore at the Euromoney Awards for Excellence 2025. The bank won 17 awards across Asia, including the Best International Bank award in six markets and Asia's Best Investment Bank for DCM, a strong testament to the leadership and strength of the business within the region.
